creator: yarodin@gmail.com
text:
I think your problem deals with this  option:
`--fixed-list-mode'
Do not merge primary user ID and primary key in `--with-colon'
listing mode and print all timestamps as seconds since 1970-01-01.
Since GnuPG 2.0.10, this mode is always used and thus this option
is obsolete; it does not harm to use it though.

KGpg 1.2.2 doesn't propper handle key listing with this obsolete option.

There are two workarounds for this problem:

1. Downgrade gnupg to 2.0.9  (i'm choose this variant)

2. Upgrade KGpg to 2.0/2.1 (and KDE to 4.1/4.2 of course)
